title: Farmland Sides
description: Gives the farmland block a unique side texture instead of using the default dirt
body:
The vanilla farmland block certanly isn't eye-candy, but it only becomes an issue for me after the block has been hydrated. The moisture hasn't even penetrated the surface, judging from looks.

![The vanilla farmland blocks are shown the left, and the blocks from my resource pack are shown on the right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1eea85683664afb182c39df6aae88ce63c360bd8_0.webp)

I've scoured the internet for a texture pack to just change this and _only_ this, but the only packs I've found are outdated and/or have a "complete overhaul" to the base pack. This pack only does two things: Gives the sides a unique texture, and adds a smoother transition between the dry and moist blockstates.

![Full transition between dry farmland and hydrated farmland from my texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/270af87952f2832066cfa03ea6de326a850990a3.webp)
